pr.title: Add file download endpoint
pr.description: Serves a file from the uploads directory by name.

files.patch:
@@ -0,0 +1,7 @@
+import os
+
+
+def download_file(base_dir, filename):
+    path = os.path.join(base_dir, filename)
+    with open(path, "rb") as f:
+        return f.read()
+

planted_defects.description: Path traversal: filename is joined onto base_dir with os.path.join without normalizing or validating it, so a value like '../../etc/passwd' escapes base_dir and reads arbitrary files on the server.
